title: Match Types
seoTitle: Game of Darts Match Types | BarkinMad Studios
description: Understand the main darts formats in Game of Darts, including X01, Cricket, Snooker, Bob's 27, 1 to 20, and party modes.
summary: Game of Darts covers scoring, practice, and party formats rather than the arcade loops used by the ZX Series.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for pending Game of Darts match types image
sourceNotes: Rules summaries are based on the in-app GamesRules source.
Only source-backed live modes are described as available release-facing modes.

sections.heading: Match and practice formats
paragraphs: Match/X01 supports 501, 301, and 701 style countdown play, with legs, sets, checkout rules, and bust handling.
Practice and training formats include Bob's 27, where players work through doubles from Double 1 to Double 20 and bull, and 1 to 20, where players hit numbers in order.

sections.heading: Alternate formats
paragraphs: Cricket uses 15-20 and bullseye, with numbers closed after three marks. Snooker mirrors snooker-style reds and colours on the dartboard.
Party modes include Hare & Hound, Halve It, and All 5s. Development modes such as Baseball, Shanghai, and Killer are not presented as release-facing modes here.
